title: epidendrum llavei
intro: Epidendrum llavei, also known as the Lady's Tresses orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the Orchidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is often used to treat colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, Epidendrum llavei is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
